UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2018, MOTION TO REQUEST DEFAULT PROVE UP HEARING DATE - GRANTED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY NICHOLE M. RODICH, CSR #11604. TELEPHONE: 415-551-0616. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALTRUISTIC CAPITAL LIMITED A PARTNERSHIP AKA ALTRUISTIC CAPITAL LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY (LLC) FLAWLESS SOLUTIONS HOLDINGS, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JONES, DARRELL AKA DARRELL I JONES $37,509.94 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $37,509.94, SEE SCANNED DOC - JUDGMENT IS APPORTIONED AS FOLLOWS: $27,088.13 AS TO DEFENDANTS ALTRUISTIC CAPITAL LIMITED, A PARTNERSHIP, A/K/A ALTRUISTIC CAPITAL, LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY (LLC) AND DARRELL JONES, A/K/A DARRELL I. JONES, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, AS TO LINE OF CREDIT 1; AND $10,221.81 AS TO DEFENDANTS FLAWLESS SOLUTIONS HOLDINGS, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AND DARRELL JONES, A/K/A DARRELL I. JONES, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, AS TO LINE OF CREDIT 2. HOWEVER, IN NO EVENT SHALL PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION BE ENTITLED TO RECOVER, IN TOTAL, MORE THAN THE MAXIMUM AMOUNT OF $37,309.94.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2018 Off Calendar

Motion To Request Default Prove Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Altruistic Capital Limited, a partnership a/k/a Altruistic Capital, Limited Liability Company (LLC), Flawless Soultions Holdings, LLC, a limited liability company and Darrell Jones, a/k/a Darrell I. Jones.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Nichole M. Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-0616.

Roger E. Jackson, Esq. appeared for Wells Fargo Bank, National Association.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Altruistic Capital Limited, a partnership a/k/a Altruistic Capital, Limited Liability Company (LLC), Flawless Soultions Holdings, LLC, a limited liability company or Darrell Jones, a/k/a Darrell I. Jones
Defaults were entered against defendants Altruistic Capital Limited, a partnership a/k/a Altruistic Capital, Limited Liability Company (LLC) and Darrell Jones, a/k/a Darrell I. Jones on October 26, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant Flawless Soultions Holdings, LLC, a limited liability company, on November 9, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 13, 2015.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, National Association, and against the Defaulted Defendants Altruistic Capital Limited, a partnership a/k/a Altruistic Capital, Limited Liability Company (LLC), Flawless Soultions Holdings, LLC, a limited liability company and Darrell Jones, a/k/a Darrell I. Jones, as follows:

Damages - $37,309.94.

Total - $37,309.94.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2018 Continued To Mar-28-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
